Attributes.Description: Duration of the trip in seconds.
Timestamp indicating when the trip started.
Name of the station where the trip started.
Timestamp indicating when the trip ended.
Name of the station where the trip ended.
Unique identifier for the bike used during the trip.
Type of user subscription (e.g., Subscriber or Customer).
ZIP code associated with the user who made the trip.
Date for the weather record.
Maximum temperature recorded in Fahrenheit.
Average temperature recorded in Fahrenheit.
Minimum temperature recorded in Fahrenheit.
Maximum dew point recorded in Fahrenheit.
Average dew point recorded in Fahrenheit.
Minimum dew point recorded in Fahrenheit.
Maximum humidity percentage recorded.
Average humidity percentage recorded.
Minimum humidity percentage recorded.
Maximum sea level pressure recorded in inches.
Average sea level pressure recorded in inches.
Minimum sea level pressure recorded in inches.
Maximum visibility recorded in miles.
Average visibility recorded in miles.
Minimum visibility recorded in miles.
Maximum wind speed recorded in miles per hour.
Average wind speed recorded in miles per hour.
Maximum gust speed recorded in miles per hour.
Amount of precipitation recorded in inches.
Cloud cover on a scale from 0 (clear) to 10 (overcast).
Weather events recorded (e.g., rain, snow, fog).
Average wind direction in degrees.
ZIP code where the weather data was recorded.
Number of bikes available at the station at the given time.
Number of docks available at the station at the given time.
Timestamp for the status record.
Name of the station associated with the status record.
Name of the bike station.
Latitude coordinate of the bike station.
Longitude coordinate of the bike station.
Total number of docks available at the station.
City where the bike station is located.
Date when the station was installed.
